response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates extensive software development experience across multiple platforms, the role requires native-level Japanese language proficiency (a hard requirement) which is completely absent from the resume. More critically, the position demands deep expertise in embedded security, networking protocols, and Linux kernel analysis—areas where the candidate has no demonstrated experience. The career trajectory has been almost exclusively web, mobile, and full-stack development, not the embedded firmware and security focus this role demands.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong systems-level knowledge demonstrated through Linux administration, Docker, CI/CD infrastructure, and DevOps work
Fluent English communication and proven ability to quickly learn new programming languages and technical domains
concerns: Complete absence of native-level Japanese language proficiency, listed as a required qualification
No evidence of security technology experience (encryption, authentication protocols, MACsec, 802.1X, tamper detection)
No demonstrated networking expertise (Layer-2/3 protocols, switch operation, NETCONF, SNMP, or kernel-level analysis and modification)
